Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
60 
CLM_TYPE_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Type Code 
DESCRIPTION: A code indicating what kind of payment is covered in this claim. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_TYPE_CD 
LONG NAME: CLM_TYPE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
1 = A fee-for-service (FFS) Medicaid or Medicaid-expansion claim 
2 = Medicaid or
